entity.name: DepreciationRateConfig

integer.name: typeSelect
integer.title: Type
integer.help: Depreciation reduces the weighted average price. Valorization increases it.

many-to-one.name: product
many-to-one.title: Product
many-to-one.help: Specific product for this depreciation rate configuration

many-to-one.name: productCategory
many-to-one.title: Product category
many-to-one.help: Product category for this depreciation rate configuration

many-to-one.name: productFamily
many-to-one.title: Product family
many-to-one.help: Product family for this depreciation rate configuration

many-to-one.name: stockRotationCategory
many-to-one.title: Rotation stock category
many-to-one.help: Stock rotation category (formula-based) for this depreciation rate configuration
